description.p: A modern application store for managing Flatpak applications.

screenshot.caption: Main application window showing start page
search functionality in the home view
Modal for install an specific application

description.p: This release marks a major milestone in making Klia Store welcoming to everyone, regardless of how they interact with their computer.

ul.li: Full keyboard navigation across the entire app — browse, install, and manage apps without ever touching the mouse.
Screen reader support throughout — every button, card, and status message is now properly announced by tools like Orca.
Three color vision modes: Deuteranopia, Protanopia, and Tritanopia — the entire interface adapts its palette so nothing gets lost in translation.
High contrast mode for users who need sharper text and stronger visual boundaries.
Reduced motion option for users sensitive to animations — the app becomes completely still on request.
A new Settings panel in the main toolbar lets you change any of these preferences at any time, not just during first setup.
Accessibility preferences are remembered across sessions — set it once, and Klia Store stays the way you need it.
All interface colors now respond to your chosen accessibility mode — nothing is left hardcoded.
